programmes.show_description: On a mission to find drug labs in the Colombian jungle, Keith Stansell crashes. He's kidnapped by FARC guerrillas and held hostage for over five years.
Mark brings a city to a standstill with his multi-million-dollar load. Yogi ventures on an antiques roadshow where time is of the essence.
A burnt-out van abandoned on an isolated towpath presents a serious challenge for Steve and Marta.
A huge lorry straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush-hour headache for Steve and his colleague Pat, and Jim gets drenched as he risks life and limb.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
The Traffic Cops come up against some of the most dangerous and vicious criminals operating on their North Yorkshire patch.
The interceptors smash down a door to save a man's life, and a fleeing Land Rover rams two cop cars in a bid to get away.
The Cumbrian interceptors tackle a woman trapped inside a burning car, a bad boy racer, a bullock breakout and drink-related incidents on Black Eye Friday.
Western adventure starring John Wayne and Geraldine Page. A Native American scout tries to return a pioneer's wife, abandoned by her cowardly husband, but she refuses to leave. (1953)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western adventure starring John Wayne and Geraldine Page. A Native American scout tries to return a pioneer's wife, abandoned by her cowardly husband, but she refuses to leave. (1953)
Classic action western starring John Wayne and Forrest Tucker. A cattle baron takes on an unscrupulous entrepreneur who is determined to subdue a New Mexico town. (1970)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Classic action western starring John Wayne and Forrest Tucker. A cattle baron takes on an unscrupulous entrepreneur who is determined to subdue a New Mexico town. (1970)
Craig and his crew tackle Gollen, the steepest block they've seen, but storms and a stuck truck halt progress. Meanwhile, Brent battles repairs and snowfall while clearing a ski trail.
A fifth of the offences which North Yorkshire Police deal with, like theft and drug-dealing, are committed by crooks from outside the area.
The high-octane documentary series. When interceptors pursue a vehicle with obscured number plates, it charges off the wrong way down the A46. Plus carjacking at knife point.
Police intercept units on patrol. Rob and Dan pursue of an under-powered runaway hatchback before the suspect decamps and makes a run for it - in a fluorescent jacket!
PC Joe Gorman races to stop a potential drink driver before there's a collision. And cops stop a driver who hits almost 100mph. Will a drugs test reveal anything?
The Duke fills the title role of this western as the avenging head of the McCandle clan who leads a posse in search of his kidnapped grandson.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
The Duke fills the title role of this western as the avenging head of the McCandle clan who leads a posse in search of his kidnapped grandson.
When the X-Files project is officially disbanded, Mulder and Scully can hardly contain their boredom and set about solving a new mystery involving UFOs.
Twenty-eight-year-old Canadian Tabitha Ritchie's life took a terrifying turn when she was caught smuggling drugs out of Colombia.
Sharon has to move a copper mountain, Sludge must shift a freight of highly flammable liquid, and mobile butcher Larry must save his meat from the heat.
Steve is called to the scene of an overturned gas tanker that may be leaking highly flammable propane. Sean is asked to pick up an abandoned scaffolding lorry.
Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.

Highlights from the series that follows experts who transport huge and unusual loads across the nation. (Ep4)
Police follow up reports of a crossbow. Mark pursues the world's worst driver.
Nottinghamshire's finest are back with a bang as the interceptors clash with a runaway driver in one of the most epic police pursuits ever caught on camera.
Western drama starring an Oscar-winning John Wayne as hard-drinking US marshal "Rooster" Cogburn, who sets out to find the killer of a teenage girl's father. (1969)

The Class of '92 - Ronnie O'Sullivan, John Higgins and Mark Williams - are joined by King of the Crucible, Stephen Hendry in a unique four-player tournament, live from the Goffs Arena, Ireland.
New Jersey police crack down on reckless driving. A cop is called to an exploding minibus and attends a three-car crash on one of the state's most dangerous roads. (Ep1)
Patrol officer Malek Badeer stops a car with a dangerous DIY repair job, and patrol man Matt Rugel's routine traffic stop proves unfortunate for a wanted man.
The Class of '92 - Ronnie O'Sullivan, John Higgins and Mark Williams - are joined by King of the Crucible, Stephen Hendry in a unique four-player tournament, live from the Goffs Arena, Ireland.
A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman's impatience lands her in hot water when she's pulled over for tailgating.
A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver's assortment of containers raises some questions.
A supernatural killer whom Mulder helped to imprison is released on parole, and a deadly game of cat-and-mouse begins.
